questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: A cube has each side 6 cm. In how many smaller cubes of each side 1 cm can it be divided?

solutions.solution: Each side of bigger cube will be divided into 6 parts. It means, n = Side of bigger cube / Side of smaller cube = 6 / 1 = 6. Required number of smaller cubes = (n)³ = (6)³ = 216
